'''Freckers''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Rodent/Legends|rodents]]. Though wild and brutal, they were capable of [[Language/Legends|intelligent speech]]. Freckers also wore clothes, denoting some manner of culture.

[[5 BBY/Legends|Five years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Gru'um Ropple]] and [[Miramba]] transported a horde of Freckers to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]], planning to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] by unleashing the Freckers to kill him during his sleep. As it happened, [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]], Jabba's [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]], had plans of his own; he and six co-conspirators hoped to capture Jabba alive so that they could [[Torture/Legends|pry out]] as many secrets as possible before killing him. When the Freckers were unleashed upon the court, instead of carrying out his own plan, Fortuna ordered his men to kill the Freckers. The rodents in turn killed all of Fortuna's men save for [[Nivek (criminal)|Nivek]], who had been blinded by the Freckers' bites and began yelling about "the plan". Fortuna, fearing discovery, shot the thug.
